office_does: The assessor values taxable property, maintains parcel records, and administers exemptions and appeals under state law.
race_blurb: Challenger Britini Port emphasizes valuation, service, appeals, and technology; incumbent Wes Cornelius emphasizes accredited appraisal, compliance, records access, and continuity.

candidates.summary: Port has property-assessment and customer-service experience and emphasizes accurate valuation, transparent methods, appeals, and technology.
highlights: Emphasizes transparent valuation and efficient technology [S1]

experience.basis: Relevant assessment experience supports her qualifications, while no office-leading tenure is documented.

candidates.summary: Cornelius is the incumbent assessor and a state-accredited appraiser emphasizing consistency, compliance, access, expertise, and continuity.
highlights: Is a state-accredited appraiser emphasizing continuity [S1]

experience.basis: Incumbency and accredited appraisal expertise provide a direct proven record.
